summary: Created countdowns table migration with share_token BEFORE INSERT trigger (retry loop, up to 5 attempts), set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE trigger, three indexes (user_id, share_token UNIQUE, target_date), RLS enabled, and rollback comment block.
next_actions: Apply migration via Supabase dashboard SQL editor or supabase db push
Add RLS policies for SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE (stubs included in migration file comments)
